steps.observed: Page loaded with album viewer visible

steps.expected: Reroll triggered, shuffle icon spins during loading

evidence.codeInspection: Shuffle icon has animate-spin class applied when loading=true in App.tsx line: <Shuffle className={cn("h-4 w-4", loading && "animate-spin")} />

steps.action: Wait for previous operation to complete

steps.expected: Catalog refresh triggered, refresh icon spins

evidence.codeInspection: RefreshCcw icon has animate-spin class applied when refreshDisabled=true in App.tsx line: <RefreshCcw className={cn("h-4 w-4", refreshDisabled && "animate-spin")} />

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. Both loading spin animations are correctly implemented using Tailwind's animate-spin utility class. The Shuffle icon on the Reroll button spins when loading, and the RefreshCcw icon on the Refresh button spins during catalog refresh.
